chapter_title.ar: باب أَقَلِّ مَا يُعْطَى مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ وَ أَكْثَرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – The least of what would be given from the Zakāt, and the most

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ

text: هُ سُئِلَ كَمْ يُعْطَى الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا أَعْطَيْتَ فَأَغْنِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idreed, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Amro Bin Saeed, from Musaddiq Bin Sadaqa, from Ammar Bin Musa,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having been asked, ‘How much can the man give from the Zakāt’. Heasws said: ‘Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘Give him so that he get enriched’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Faddal from ‘Amr ibn Sa‘id from Musaddiq ibn Sadaqah from ‘Ammar ibn Musa who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was once asked about how much Zakat can be given to one person. He (the Imam) said, that abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you pay make him rich.’”
